source_pr.title: planner: fix unstable test TestPushDownSelectionForMPP
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?


Issue Number: close #36867

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests 

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test asserts on MPP/TiFlash-related plan behavior, but the read-engine selection can vary if `tidb_isolation_read_engines` is not pinned, leading to intermittent plan differences. This PR stabilizes the test by explicitly setting `@@tidb_isolation_read_engines='tiflash,tidb'` so the optimizer consistently considers TiFlash for MPP.
fix_pattern: Pin `tidb_isolation_read_engines` in the test so the optimizer consistently considers TiFlash/MPP and plan assertions are stable.

evidence: evidence: planner: fix unstable test TestPushDownSelectionForMPP
